hero.title: Premium Tissue OEM/ODM Manufacturer
hero.subtitle: 20 Years of Excellence | Export Worldwide | Focus on Facial Tissue & Bottom-Drawer Series

tissue.name: Ssmee Running Series — Facial Tissue
tissue.desc: 5-ply thickened structure, wet-strength, soft and delicate. Embossed process, no荧光剂, no fragrance, no additives, water-washable. Perfect for home, restaurant, hotel.

bottomDrawer.name: Ssmee Running Series — Bottom-Drawer Tissue
bottomDrawer.desc: Easy-pull bottom design, 5-ply reinforced, strong and tear-resistant. Embossed process, no fluorescent agent, no fragrance, no additives, water-washable. Perfect for home, office, public spaces.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: 20 Years of Dedication to Premium Tissue
about.story: Founded in 2006 in Dongguan, Guangdong Province, Ssmee is a professional tissue R&D, production and sales brand enterprise.

factory.desc: Multiple fully automated production lines with annual capacity exceeding 5,000 tons.

export.title: Global Export
export.desc: Products exported to Southeast Asia, Russia, Middle East and other countries and regions.

overview.title: Company Overview
overview.desc1: Founded in 2006 in Dongguan, Guangdong Province, China. Ssmee is a professional tissue R&D, production and sales brand enterprise. With modern production base, multiple automated lines, annual capacity over 5,000 tons.
overview.desc2: We adhere to quality-first and customer-centric philosophy. Products are exported to Southeast Asia, Russia, Middle East and other regions, trusted by customers worldwide.
